notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Nasim Nuñez. Moisés Ballesteros scores. Miguel Amaya scores. Michael Busch to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Nasim Nuñez. Moisés Ballesteros scores. Miguel Amaya scores. Michael Busch to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Daylen Lile GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile grounds into a double play, first baseman Michael Busch to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Luis García Jr. out at 2nd. Daylen Lile out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Tena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Tena grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Nasim Nuñez out at 2nd. José Tena out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brady House GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brady House grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Daylen Lile out at 2nd. Brady House out at 1st.
